name: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
benefit: Rs 6000 per year in 3 installments of Rs 2000 each, directly transferred to bank account
eligibility: All landholding farmer families with cultivable land
documents: Aadhaar card, land records, bank account
how_to_apply: Apply online at pmkisan.gov.in or visit nearest Common Service Center (CSC)

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
benefit: Short-term credit up to Rs 3 lakh at 4% interest rate for crop cultivation, also covers post-harvest expenses
eligibility: All farmers including tenant farmers, sharecroppers, and oral lessees
documents: Aadhaar, land documents or lease agreement, passport size photo
how_to_apply: Apply at any nearby bank branch (nationalized, cooperative, or rural bank)

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
benefit: Crop insurance covering losses due to natural calamities, pests, diseases. Premium is only 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi crops
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
documents: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, sowing certificate
how_to_apply: Apply through banks, CSCs, or online at pmfby.gov.in before the cutoff date for each season

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
benefit: Free soil testing every 2 years with fertilizer recommendations to improve productivity
eligibility: All farmers
documents: Land records, Aadhaar
how_to_apply: Contact local Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK) or agriculture department office

name: PM Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY)
benefit: Subsidy up to 55% for drip/sprinkler irrigation systems to improve water use efficiency
eligibility: All farmers, with higher subsidy for small and marginal farmers
documents: Land records, Aadhaar, bank account
how_to_apply: Apply through state agriculture department or horticulture department

name: National Agriculture Market (e-NAM)
benefit: Online trading platform connecting farmers to buyers across India for better price discovery
eligibility: All farmers registered with local mandi
documents: Aadhaar, bank account, mandi registration
how_to_apply: Register at your nearest e-NAM linked mandi or online at enam.gov.in

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)
benefit: State-specific funding support for agriculture infrastructure, equipment subsidy, and farmer training
eligibility: Varies by state scheme component
documents: Varies by state
how_to_apply: Contact state agriculture department

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maandhan Yojana
benefit: Pension of Rs 3000 per month after age 60 for small and marginal farmers
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers aged 18-40 years with up to 2 hectares land
documents: Aadhaar, bank account, land records, age proof
how_to_apply: Apply at nearest CSC or online at maandhan.in

name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund (AIF)
benefit: Loan up to Rs 2 crore at 3% interest subvention for building storage, cold chains, processing units
eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, agri-entrepreneurs, cooperatives
documents: Project proposal, land documents, bank account
how_to_apply: Apply through participating banks or online at agriinfra.dac.gov.in

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
benefit: Financial assistance of Rs 50,000 per hectare over 3 years for organic farming adoption
eligibility: Farmer groups willing to adopt organic farming practices
documents: Land records, group formation documents, Aadhaar
how_to_apply: Contact state agriculture department or KVK for cluster formation

name: National Livestock Mission
benefit: Subsidy for poultry, sheep, goat, and piggery farming entrepreneurship up to 50% of project cost
eligibility: Individual farmers, FPOs, SHGs, cooperatives engaged in livestock rearing
documents: Project report, Aadhaar, bank account, land/shed documents
how_to_apply: Apply through state Animal Husbandry Department or online at nlm.udyamimitra.in

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)
benefit: Financial support for fish farming, hatcheries, and fisheries infrastructure, subsidy up to 40-60%
eligibility: Fish farmers, fishermen, fisheries cooperatives, entrepreneurs
documents: Aadhaar, land/water body documents, bank account, project proposal
how_to_apply: Apply through state Fisheries Department or district fisheries office

name: Mahila Kisan Sashaktikaran Pariyojana (MKSP)
benefit: Training, capacity building and resources for women farmers to improve agricultural productivity and income
eligibility: Women farmers, especially those in self-help groups (SHGs)
documents: Aadhaar, SHG membership proof
how_to_apply: Contact local SHG federation or Rural Livelihood Mission office

name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM)
benefit: Subsidy of 40-50% on purchase of tractors, tillers, harvesters and other farm equipment
eligibility: All farmers, higher subsidy for SC/ST, women, and small/marginal farmers
documents: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, quotation of equipment
how_to_apply: Apply online through state agriculture mechanization portal or at CSC

name: National Food Security Mission (NFSM)
benefit: Assistance for seeds, farm machinery, and training to increase production of rice, wheat, pulses, and coarse cereals
eligibility: Farmers growing notified crops in identified districts
documents: Land records, Aadhaar, bank account
how_to_apply: Contact district agriculture office or block-level extension officer

name: Interest Subvention Scheme for short term crop loans
name_hindi: अल्पकालिक फसल ऋण ब्याज सहायता योजना
benefit: 2% interest subvention plus additional 3% for prompt repayment, effectively bringing crop loan interest to 4%
eligibility: Farmers availing crop loans up to Rs 3 lakh through KCC
documents: KCC account, Aadhaar, bank account
how_to_apply: Automatically applied when repaying KCC loan on time at the bank

name: Rural Godown Scheme / Warehouse Infrastructure
benefit: Subsidy of 25-33% for constructing rural godowns/warehouses to reduce post-harvest losses
eligibility: Individual farmers, FPOs, cooperatives, agri-entrepreneurs
documents: Land documents, project proposal, bank account
how_to_apply: Apply through NABARD or state agriculture marketing board

name: Formation and Promotion of Farmer Producer Organizations (FPO)
benefit: Financial support up to Rs 18 lakh over 3 years for forming and running farmer collectives for better bargaining power
eligibility: Group of minimum 11 farmers (plains) or 7 farmers (hilly/NE areas)
documents: Group registration, member list, Aadhaar of members
how_to_apply: Contact Cluster Based Business Organization (CBBO) or NABARD regional office

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan (PM-KUSUM)
benefit: Subsidy up to 60% for installing solar pumps and solar power plants on farmland, reduces electricity cost and gives extra income
eligibility: Individual farmers, cooperatives, panchayats with access to land/barren land
documents: Land records, Aadhaar, bank account, electricity connection details
how_to_apply: Apply through state renewable energy department or pmkusum.mnre.gov.in

name: National Mission on Edible Oils - Oil Palm (NMEO-OP)
benefit: Financial assistance for oil palm cultivation including planting material subsidy and maintenance support for 4 years
eligibility: Farmers in notified oil palm growing states/districts
documents: Land records, Aadhaar, bank account
how_to_apply: Contact state horticulture department or district agriculture office

name: Gramin Bhandaran Yojana (Rural Storage)
benefit: Capital subsidy for setting up scientific storage to avoid distress sale and reduce wastage
eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, individual entrepreneurs, cooperatives
documents: Land/lease documents, project report, bank account
how_to_apply: Apply through NABARD-empanelled banks

name: Dairy Entrepreneurship Development Scheme (DEDS)
benefit: Subsidy up to 25-33% for setting up dairy units, milking machines, and milk processing equipment
eligibility: Farmers, individuals, SHGs, NGOs interested in dairy farming
documents: Project report, Aadhaar, bank account, land/shed proof
how_to_apply: Apply through NABARD or nearby commercial/cooperative bank

name: UP Bhulekh / Land Record Digitization (State Scheme - UP)
benefit: Free digital access to land records (khatauni, khasra) needed for applying to most farmer schemes
eligibility: All landowning farmers in Uttar Pradesh
documents: Aadhaar, old land record/khatauni number
how_to_apply: Visit upbhulekh.gov.in or nearest Lekhpal/Tehsil office

name: UP Kisan Durghatna Bima Yojana (State Scheme - UP)
name_hindi: उत्तर प्रदेश किसान दुर्घटना बीमा योजना
benefit: Insurance cover up to Rs 5 lakh in case of accidental death or disability of a farmer
eligibility: All registered farmers in Uttar Pradesh aged 18-70 years
documents: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, accident proof (if claiming)
how_to_apply: Apply through Tehsil office or UP agriculture department portal

name: Micro Irrigation Fund (MIF)
benefit: Low-interest loans to states to expand drip and sprinkler irrigation coverage, indirectly subsidizing farmer adoption
eligibility: Farmers benefiting through state-implemented micro-irrigation projects
documents: Land records, Aadhaar, bank account
how_to_apply: Apply through state horticulture/agriculture department implementing MIF projects
